testcase.name: handleMultiSelectToggle() > does nothing when renderer is null
handleMultiSelectToggle() > enters multi-select mode when not already in it
handleMultiSelectToggle() > exits multi-select mode when already in it
exitMultiSelectMode() > does nothing when renderer is null
exitMultiSelectMode() > calls renderer.exitMultiSelectMode and hides selection bar
handleSelectionChange() > updates the selection count display
handleSelectionChange() > shows "1 chat selected" for a single selection
updateSelectionBar() > disables action buttons when count < 2
updateSelectionBar() > enables action buttons when count >= 2
updateSelectionBar() > shows count in selectionCount element
updateSelectionBar() > sets accessible titles on action buttons for >= 2 count
updateSelectionBar() > does not throw when elements are absent
handleCopyAll() > does nothing when renderer is null
handleCopyAll() > shows error when fewer than 2 chats selected
handleCopyAll() > shows success notification after successful copy
handleCopyAll() > shows error when clipboard content is too large
handleCopyAll() > shows error when copy fails (ok: false, tooLarge: false)
handleCopyAll() > shows error when loadFullByIds throws

handleExportDigest() > shows error when fewer than 2 chats selected
handleExportDigest() > calls showExportDigest when 2+ chats selected
handleExportDigest() > shows alert when export throws

handleJoin() > returns early when folder form is cancelled

handleJoin() > reuses existing Joined folder when it already exists
handleJoin() > saves to a specified folder topic when topicId is not __joined__
handleJoin() > calls saveTree, loadAll, and renderTreeView on success
handleJoin() > shows success notification after join
handleJoin() > shows error notification when addChat throws

testcase.name: formatDate > returns empty string for null / undefined / empty
formatDate > returns a non-empty string for a valid ISO date
formatDate > returns the original string for an invalid date
escapeHtml > returns empty string for null / undefined
escapeHtml > escapes & < > "
escapeHtml > escapes ampersand
escapeHtml > leaves safe text unchanged
sourceLabel > maps chatgpt
sourceLabel > maps claude
sourceLabel > maps gemini
sourceLabel > maps copilot
sourceLabel > returns source string for unknown
sourceLabel > returns Unknown for empty / null
sourceLabel > returns Excerpt when isExcerpt is true
badgeClass > returns badge--chatgpt for chatgpt
badgeClass > returns badge--unknown for unknown source
badgeClass > returns badge--excerpt when isExcerpt is true regardless of source
applyInline > converts **bold** to <strong>
applyInline > converts *italic* to <em>
applyInline > converts `code` to <code>
applyInline > does not double-process bold inside code
applyInline > returns unchanged text when no formatting present
applyInline > handles empty string
applyInline > converts ![alt](https://url) to
applyInline > converts data: image URL to
applyInline > keeps & encoded in image src URL (valid HTML attribute)
applyInline > converts [text](url) to an anchor tag
applyInline > keeps & encoded in link href (valid HTML attribute)
applyInline > handles links alongside bold text
renderMarkdown > returns empty string for null / undefined / empty
renderMarkdown > strips YAML frontmatter
renderMarkdown > renders # heading as <h1>
renderMarkdown > renders ## heading as <h2>
renderMarkdown > renders ### heading as <h3>
renderMarkdown > renders --- as <hr>
renderMarkdown > renders fenced code block as a code-block widget with header and copy button
renderMarkdown > does not double-escape HTML inside code blocks
renderMarkdown > renders blockquote > as <blockquote>
renderMarkdown > renders standalone ![alt](url) as an
renderMarkdown > renders [text](url) link inside paragraph
renderMarkdown > auto-links a bare https URL
renderMarkdown > auto-links a bare http URL
renderMarkdown > does not double-link an explicit markdown link whose href is a URL
renderMarkdown > trims trailing period from auto-linked URL and keeps the period as text
renderMarkdown > trims trailing ) from auto-linked URL
renderMarkdown > auto-links URL with path and query string
renderMarkdown > does not link text that starts with http inside a word (e.g. no-op for plain text)
renderMarkdown > renders Microsoft Designer as a card (not iframe)
renderMarkdown > Designer card does not clobber surrounding text
renderMarkdown > audio marker with data: src renders <audio controls> player
renderMarkdown > audio marker with https: src renders <audio controls> player
renderMarkdown > audio marker with blob: src renders unavailable notice
renderMarkdown > audio marker without URL (not captured) renders unavailable notice
renderMarkdown > audio card does not clobber surrounding text
renderMarkdown > audio src URL is HTML-escaped in the output
renderMarkdown > standalone PDF filename renders as file-attachment-chip
renderMarkdown > chip includes session note text
renderMarkdown > without sourceUrl chip renders as <div>
renderMarkdown > with sourceUrl chip renders as <a> linking to the source
renderMarkdown > emoji-prefixed filename (from messagesToMarkdown) renders chip
renderMarkdown > emoji-prefixed filename in full serialised content renders chip inside assistant turn
renderMarkdown > sourceUrl is passed through to emoji-prefixed chip
renderMarkdown > filename + blank line + type label renders chip, drops bare type label
renderMarkdown > DOCX file renders chip with correct ext badge
renderMarkdown > CSV file renders chip with correct ext badge
renderMarkdown > Python file renders chip
renderMarkdown > filename embedded in prose is NOT rendered as chip
renderMarkdown > filename inside code block is NOT rendered as chip
renderMarkdown > chip does not clobber surrounding text
renderMarkdown > multiple attachment lines each render as separate chips
renderMarkdown > renders - list items as <ul>
renderMarkdown > renders numbered list items as <ol>
renderMarkdown > wraps plain text lines in
renderMarkdown > escapes HTML entities in plain text
renderMarkdown > applies inline formatting inside paragraphs
renderMarkdown > renders full messagesToMarkdown output correctly
processSources > returns early for null input

processSources > replaces a Sources

+

    pair with a .sources-trigger button

testcase.name: processSources > chip label uses plural "sources" for multiple links

processSources > does nothing when the

is not empty. and has no following

testcase.name:
processSources > does nothing to

elements that are not "Sources:"
processSources > does nothing when the <ul> has no links
testcase.system-out: [bAInder] processSources: Sources ul has no valid links

testcase.name: setupSourcesPanel > injects #sources-panel and #sources-overlay into the DOM
setupSourcesPanel > is idempotent — calling twice does not create a second panel
setupSourcesPanel > panel starts with aria-hidden="true"
setupSourcesPanel > clicking a .sources-trigger opens the panel and populates the list
setupSourcesPanel > close button hides the panel
setupSourcesPanel > Escape key closes an open panel
setupSourcesPanel > links in the panel open in a new tab
showError > shows the error state
showError > sets the error message text
renderChat > shows the reader header

title: "Test Chat"
source: claude
url: https://claude.ai/chat/abc
date: 2026-02-20T00:00:00.000Z
messageCount: 2
contentFormat: markdown-v1

# Test Chat

🙋 Hello

---

🤖 Hi there!

testcase.name: renderChat > keeps entire assistant response in one .chat-turn--assistant when response contains internal --- rules
testcase.system-out:
[bAInder] [INFO] [reader] renderMarkdown: content length [33m224[39m | audio markers: [33m0[39m | lines with file extensions: [] [bAInder] [INFO] [reader] full content dump: "---
title: "HR Test"
source: chatgpt
contentFormat: markdown-v1
---

# HR Test

🙋 User question

---

🤖 First paragraph of response

---

Second paragraph of response

---

🙋 Second user question

---

🤖 Second response
"

testcase.name: init > shows error when no chatId in URL
init > shows error when chatId not found in storage
init > renders the chat when chatId is found

[bAInder] [INFO] [reader] renderMarkdown: content length [33m111[39m | audio markers: [33m0[39m | lines with file extensions: [] [bAInder] [INFO] [reader] full content dump: "---

# Found Chat Array

Some content
"

testcase.name: init > header and content are shown, error is hidden, after successful render
testcase.system-out:
[bAInder] [INFO] [reader] renderMarkdown: content length [33m87[39m | audio markers: [33m0[39m | lines with file extensions: [] [bAInder] [INFO] [reader] full content dump: "---
title: "Render Test"
source: copilot
contentFormat: markdown-v1
---

# Render Test
"

testcase.name: init > error state is shown and header remains hidden when chat not found
init > shows error when chatId not in array
init > shows error when storage throws
setupRating > renders 5 star buttons
setupRating > marks stars up to currentRating as is-set
setupRating > shows no stars filled when rating is 0/null
setupRating > makes the container visible
setupRating > clicking a star saves the new rating to storage
setupRating > clicking the same star twice clears the rating
setupRating > is a no-op when #reader-rating element is absent
getScrollPositions > returns empty object when nothing stored
getScrollPositions > returns stored positions
getScrollPositions > returns empty object when localStorage contains invalid JSON
saveScrollPosition > persists a new position
saveScrollPosition > updates an existing position
saveScrollPosition > is a no-op when chatId is falsy
saveScrollPosition > evicts the oldest entry when cap is exceeded
saveScrollPosition > re-inserting an existing id moves it to the end (no eviction size change)
restoreScrollPosition > calls window.scrollTo with the stored Y value
restoreScrollPosition > does not call window.scrollTo when no position stored
restoreScrollPosition > is a no-op when chatId is falsy
setupReaderCopyButton > returns gracefully when button is absent
setupReaderCopyButton > success path: shows ✓ Copied feedback after click
setupReaderCopyButton > tooLarge path: skips clipboard write and shows error feedback
setupReaderCopyButton > fallback path: shows "Select all + paste" feedback
_findEntityBlock — attachment chips > finds a .file-attachment-chip by filename hint
_findEntityBlock — attachment chips > matching is case-insensitive
_findEntityBlock — attachment chips > returns null when filename does not match
_findEntityBlock — attachment chips > returns null when hint is null
_findEntityBlock — tables > finds a table by exact header hint (score 2)
_findEntityBlock — tables > matching is case-insensitive
_findEntityBlock — tables > falls back to partial header match (score 1) when not all cells match
_findEntityBlock — tables > returns null when no header cells match hint
_findEntityBlock — tables > returns null when table has no thead
_findEntityBlock — turn:self > returns the anchorEl itself for hint "turn:self"
_findEntityBlock — turn:self > is case-insensitive for the sentinel
_findEntityBlock — images > finds img.chat-image by exact alt text (score 2)
_findEntityBlock — images > matching is case-insensitive
_findEntityBlock — images > partial alt text match scores lower but still matches
_findEntityBlock — images > returns null when alt text does not match hint
_findEntityBlock — images > returns null when image has no alt text and hint is non-empty
countWords() > returns 0 for empty string
countWords() > returns 0 for null / undefined
countWords() > counts plain words correctly
countWords() > strips YAML frontmatter before counting
countWords() > strips fenced code blocks before counting
countWords() > strips inline code before counting
countWords() > strips markdown images before counting
countWords() > strips markdown links before counting
countWords() > handles whitespace-only text
countWords() > handles multi-line text without markdown
estimateReadTime() > returns 1 for 0 words (minimum)
estimateReadTime() > returns 1 for fewer than 200 words
estimateReadTime() > returns 1 for exactly 200 words
estimateReadTime() > rounds to nearest minute
estimateReadTime() > returns correct value for large word counts
deleteTurnsFromChat > returns null for a chat with no messages array
deleteTurnsFromChat > returns null when messages is not an array
deleteTurnsFromChat > returns an unchanged copy when turnIndices is empty
deleteTurnsFromChat > removes the specified turn by index
deleteTurnsFromChat > removes multiple turns (user + assistant)
deleteTurnsFromChat > updates messageCount to match the remaining messages
deleteTurnsFromChat > rebuilds content markdown reflecting the deleted turns
deleteTurnsFromChat > updated content contains correct messageCount in frontmatter
deleteTurnsFromChat > preserves title, source and url in the rebuilt content
deleteTurnsFromChat > can delete all turns, producing empty messages and frontmatter-only content
deleteTurnsFromChat > does not mutate the original chat object
deleteTurnsFromChat > removes entities whose messageIndex is in the deleted set
deleteTurnsFromChat > remaps messageIndex for surviving entities after deletion
deleteTurnsFromChat > removes entity type key entirely when all entities of that type are in deleted turns
deleteTurnsFromChat > handles multiple entity types simultaneously
deleteTurnsFromChat > does not add entity type keys that were not present on the original chat
setupTurnDeleteMode > adds a Select button to .reader-actions
testcase.system-out:
[bAInder] [INFO] [reader] renderMarkdown: content length [33m137[39m | audio markers: [33m0[39m | lines with file extensions: [] [bAInder] [INFO] [reader] full content dump: "---
title: "T"
source: chatgpt
date: 2025-02-19T21:20:00.000Z
messageCount: 2
contentFormat: markdown-v1
---

🙋 Hello

---

🤖 Hi there
"

[bAInder] [INFO] [reader] renderMarkdown: content length [33m152[39m | audio markers: [33m0[39m | lines with file extensions: [] [bAInder] [INFO] [reader] full content dump: "---

---

🤖 A1

---

🙋 Q2

---

🤖 A2
"

testcase.name: _entityPresentInContent > CODE: returns true when code is still present
_entityPresentInContent > CODE: returns false when code has been deleted
_entityPresentInContent > CODE: returns true when entity has no code field
_entityPresentInContent > CITATION: returns true when URL is still present
_entityPresentInContent > CITATION: returns false when URL has been deleted
_entityPresentInContent > TABLE: returns true when first header is still present
_entityPresentInContent > TABLE: returns false when first header has been deleted
_entityPresentInContent > TABLE: returns true when headers array is empty
_entityPresentInContent > DIAGRAM: returns true when source prefix is present
_entityPresentInContent > DIAGRAM: returns false when source prefix has been deleted
_entityPresentInContent > ARTIFACT: always returns true (conservative)
_entityPresentInContent > IMAGE: always returns true (conservative)
_findMarkdownRange > returns exact range for plain text match
_findMarkdownRange > returns null when text is not present
_findMarkdownRange > finds a single unordered list item (user selects just the text)
_findMarkdownRange > finds multiple contiguous list items selected together
_findMarkdownRange > finds a heading line (user selects heading text without #)
_findMarkdownRange > finds an ordered list item
_findMarkdownRange > finds a blockquote line (user selects quote text without >)
_findMarkdownRange > removing matched range leaves the rest of the content intact
_findMarkdownRange > prefers exact match over line-based for plain prose
_findMarkdownRange > matches a line containing bold markers (**text**)
_findMarkdownRange > matches a line with inline code (`code`)
_findMarkdownRange > matches a GFM table header row with bold cells
_findMarkdownRange > matches a complete table (header + data rows) skipping the separator
_findMarkdownRange > removing a bold heading leaves surrounding content intact
deleteExcerptFromChat > returns null when messages array is absent
deleteExcerptFromChat > returns null when msgIndex is out of range
deleteExcerptFromChat > returns null when selectedText is empty
deleteExcerptFromChat > returns null when selectedText is not found in the message
deleteExcerptFromChat > removes the selected text from the target message
deleteExcerptFromChat > leaves other messages unchanged
deleteExcerptFromChat > does not change messageCount (turn still exists)
deleteExcerptFromChat > rebuilds chat.content reflecting the removed text
deleteExcerptFromChat > does not mutate the original chat object
deleteExcerptFromChat > removes only the first occurrence when text appears multiple times
deleteExcerptFromChat > removes code entity whose code block was deleted
deleteExcerptFromChat > keeps code entity when its code block was not deleted
deleteExcerptFromChat > updates prompt entity text and wordCount when user message is edited
deleteExcerptFromChat > removes prompt entity when edited message becomes empty
deleteExcerptFromChat > does not touch entities from other turns
deleteExcerptFromChat > removes citation entity when its URL was deleted
deleteExcerptFromChat > does not add phantom entity keys not present on original chat
setupAnnotations delete-text button > Delete button is hidden when chat has no messages

source: chatgpt
date: 2025-02-19T21:20:00.000Z
messageCount: 0
contentFormat: markdown-v1
---
"
